task: I’ve got a doctor follow-up and a couple of appointment reminders to sort out, and I want to make sure I’m not missing anything between the visit, the paperwork, and what happens after. What’s the simplest way to keep it all straight without relying on memory?

turns.agent_response:
Use one small note with 4 lines per appointment:

- **Date/time/location**
- **What to bring / do before**
- **What they gave me / what I owe**
- **Next step / follow-up date**

Then add 3 checks:
- **Before the visit:** ID, insurance card, meds list, questions
- **At the visit:** ask for after-visit summary, referrals, test orders, refill info
- **After the visit:** file any papers, book the next appointment, note deadlines for forms or payments

If there’s more than one reminder, put the **soonest deadline first** and mark anything that needs action in **bold or red** so it doesn’t get buried.

user_simulator.text:
That’s the right idea, but I’d want it a little tighter and more foolproof.

Make it one page, same format every time:
- date/time/place
- doctor name
- what I need to bring
- what they said to do next
- any deadline / payment / follow-up

Then keep 3 separate things:
- **in the wallet**: appointment card or note
- **at home**: folder for papers, receipts, summaries
- **on the fridge or cabinet**: next appointment date and anything due

I’d also want a space for the stuff they always try to slip by you — referral, lab order, prescription refill, copay, next visit. If it isn’t written down right there, it gets lost.

If you want, I can turn that into a plain little template you can copy by hand.

turns.agent_response:
Yes — here’s a tight one-page version you can copy by hand:

## Appointment Note
**Date / time / place:**  
**Doctor:**  
**Bring:**  
**Next steps:**  
**Deadline / payment / follow-up:**  
**Watch for:** referral / lab order / prescription refill / copay / next visit

## 3 places to keep it
- **Wallet:** appointment card or tiny note
- **Home folder:** all papers, summaries, receipts
- **Fridge/cabinet:** next appointment + anything due

## Simple rule
If it needs action, write it down before you leave.

If you want, I can make this into an even cleaner fill-in-the-blank box format.

user_simulator.text:
Yeah. That’s usable.

Short enough, same pattern every time, and the “watch for” line is the part people forget. I’d use it.
